description: Style NoteCelebrate traditional style with this dupatta from fabindia. The stylish print and mix of colours make this a must buy, sitting firm on your shoulder it'll add an ethnic zing to your outfit. Chandri fabric is renowned for its very fine gossamer quality, placement of motifs and design intricacy, and has been the chosen fabric for saris produced for the royalty. The fabric's unique qualities result from the traditional method of sizing and hand weaving developed over the centuries. Wear this special piece over kurtas, leggings and heeled sandals.Product DetailsTwo toned blue and gold chanderi print dupattaStitched hemsMaterial and careSilk/cottonDry clean only
